allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch '^\(node_modules|\\.git\)$' } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
PowerShell(git init -b main; git add .; git status --short | Select-Object -First 30; "---"; "TOTAL FILES STAGED:"; \(git status --short | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path apps,packages | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; "---tree-of-new-files---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path apps/api/src/modules,apps/api/src/bootstrap,apps/client/src/features,apps/client/src/engine,apps/game-server/src/domain,apps/game-server/src/systems 2>$null | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
